description_long: A formally dressed adult male figure is depicted wearing a tailored suit with a fitted jacket, matching trousers, and a high-collared shirt with a cravat. He sports a tall top hat with a decorative band, adding a touch of historical or ceremonial flair. The figure has a neatly groomed beard and mustache, and his facial expression is neutral. His arms are slightly extended outward, and his hands are relaxed at his sides. The shoes are classic and formal, complementing the overall sophisticated appearance. The ensemble suggests a 19th-century or Victorian-era influence, suitable for urban or ceremonial settings.
description: A formally dressed adult male in a suit, cravat, and top hat, with a groomed beard and classic shoes, evoking a Victorian-era style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full suit, cravat, facial hair, and top hat, with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the top hat, facial features, and the fitted cut of the jacket.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the suit jacket, trousers, and the cylindrical shape of the top hat.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the face, hat, and the straight posture.
attribute_clothing_type: formal suit with jacket, trousers, high-collared shirt, cravat, and top hat
attribute_hairstyle: short neatly groomed hair with full beard and mustache
